flags.label: 100%-time completion
flags.summary: 100%-time completion at West Valley College fell 37% between 2009 and 2010 (12.2% → 7.7%).

flags.label: In-state tuition
flags.summary: In-state tuition at West Valley College rose 13% between 2007 and 2010 ($620 → $700).

flags.label: 3-year cohort default rate
flags.summary: 3-year cohort default rate at West Valley College fell 100% between 2021 and 2024 (7.5% → 0.0%).

flags.label: Undergraduate enrollment
flags.summary: Undergraduate enrollment at West Valley College rose 87% between 2007 and 2010 (5.9k → 11.0k).
